The average rent for a 2-bedroom apartment in Red Deer is around 1548 C$ per month. Prices typically range from 1325 C$ to 1729 C$, depending on the neighborhood, size, and features. These apartments are great for small families, couples, or roommates.

2-bedroom apartments in Red Deer average approximately 80 m² in size. These apartments usually consist of two separate bedrooms, a living room, a kitchen, a bathroom, and often feature amenities like balconies or parking.

There are currently 4 2-bedroom apartments available in Red Deer. These range from classic to modern layouts across different neighborhoods. Explore all available listings on .
